name: @quoin/tokens-paste
description: Twilio Paste design tokens translated onto the Quoin canonical semantic-token namespace.

attribution.harvestNotes: Twilio Paste 'default' theme. Paste publishes @twilio-paste/design-tokens with global/alias layers. Twilio brand red (#F22F46) is a sub-brand colour; this pack uses Paste's primary 'color-background-primary' (blue) for accent, matching the default theme. Inter is open-source.
